message:
feat(tui): dashboard alert badges and per-agent activity dots

- Database tile title shows red [N ack] badge when ack_pending > 0
- AckPnd stat line highlights in bold red when non-zero
- Agents tile shows colored activity dots: green (active <60s),
  yellow (idle <5m), gray (stale >5m)
- 6 new tests for activity_indicator boundary conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
